description_long: This is a tall, rectangular marble obelisk with a classical design, standing on a square plinth base. The front face features an engraved inscription, partially covered by a sculpted draped cloth motif, and the top is adorned with an open book relief. The marble surface is smooth but shows some weathering and discoloration, especially on the sides and back. The base is bordered by a patch of grass and moss, suggesting outdoor placement, likely in a cemetery or memorial park. The obelisk's proportions are slender and vertical, with the decorative elements concentrated on the upper front. The overall appearance is solemn and commemorative, with a focus on memorialization.
description: A tall marble obelisk with a draped cloth motif, engraved inscription, and an open book relief on top, set on a square plinth with grassy surroundings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the draped cloth motif and the open book relief at the top, with visible weathering on the marble surface.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the engraved inscription, draped cloth, and the open book relief, with the square plinth and grassy base clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying a plain marble surface with some discoloration and the open book relief visible at the top.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a mostly unadorned marble surface, with weathering and moss at the base.
attribute_inscription: There is an engraved inscription on the front face, partially visible beneath the draped cloth motif. The text appears to be in English, with serif-style lettering, but is only partially legible from the images.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative elements include a sculpted draped cloth motif on the upper front and an open book relief at the tip. Both are classical in style and carved from the same marble as the obelisk.
attribute_base_design: The base is a square plinth with a stepped design, made of marble, and bordered by a patch of grass and moss. The plinth is simple and solid, providing stability and a slight elevation.
attribute_tip_design: The tip features a sculpted open book relief, flat on top, with the book's pages and cover clearly defined. The finish is smooth and matches the marble of the rest of the obelisk.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is immediately surrounded by a patch of grass and moss, indicating outdoor placement. No other notable features or objects are present.
